atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports persistent left shoulder pain for approximately six weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain exacerbated by overhead activities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain exacerbated by lying on the affected side.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any specific injury.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports taking two extra-strength Tylenol tablets every six to eight hours.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient prescribes two extra-strength Tylenol tablets every six to eight hours.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies numbness or tingling in the arms or hands.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals limited active and passive range of motion in the left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals tenderness to palpation of the greater tuberosity of the humerus.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Capillary refill is less than three seconds in the left arm.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Sensation is intact to light touch.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Shoulder x-ray demonstrates no fractures.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms are most likely due to rotator cuff tendinopathy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes an MRI of the left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician refers the patient to physical therapy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans for approximately six to eight weeks of physical therapy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes educational materials on the physical therapy program.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a steroid injection if symptoms do not improve.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up visit in four weeks.
